message.content:
I need to design a comprehensive UX/UI improvement plan for the iskrib_v3 webapp. The user wants all four focus areas addressed. Here's what I know from exploration:

## Current State

### Architecture
- React + Vite frontend, Express backend, Supabase
- CSS variables for theming (light/dark mode, glass morphism)
- Framer Motion installed but underused
- React Query for data, Context for auth
- 47 CSS files, 104+ media queries
- Fonts: Playfair Display, Lora, Outfit, Lexend Deca

### Existing Patterns
- CSS variables in `client/src/index.css` with full light/dark palette
- Framer Motion used in: AuthModal, Bookmarks, Analytics, Comments, Onboarding
- react-spinners used: MoonLoader, BarLoader, BeatLoader
- Toast pattern exists only for bookmarks (ad-hoc, positioned absolute in PostCards)
- Skeleton loaders exist in RelatedPosts.jsx (shimmer animation)
- PostCards.jsx uses useInfiniteQuery with Intersection Observer
- App.jsx has lazy-loaded routes with Suspense
- Home.jsx manages sidebar + feed + right sidebar layout
- editor.css, postcards.css, contentviewer.css, home.css are key CSS files
- No formal spacing/type scale tokens
- ~50% aria label coverage
- Only @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) found in App.css
- ErrorBoundary only exists in Editor (class component, plain text display)
- Failed mutations (comments, likes, follows) log to console, no user feedback
- Feed shows MoonLoader spinner, no skeleton cards
- Route transitions are instant cuts (no animation)

### Key Files
- `client/src/index.css` - global CSS variables
- `client/src/App.jsx` - routing, LexicalComposer wrapper
- `client/src/components/HomePage/Home.jsx` + `home.css` - main layout
- `client/src/components/HomePage/postCards/PostCards.jsx` + `postcards.css` - feed
- `client/src/components/HomePage/ContentViewer/ContentView.jsx` + `contentviewer.css` - post view
- `client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/Editor.jsx` + `editor.css` - editor
- `client/src/components/Reactions/ReactionButton.jsx` - like/reaction system
- `client/src/components/SideBar/` - navigation
- `client/src/components/Onboarding/` - onboarding wizard (reference for polish level)
- `client/src/components/Discovery/RelatedPosts.jsx` - has skeleton loader pattern to reuse

## Requirements

Design a phased implementation plan for these 4 areas:

### 1. Error UX + Toast System (Critical)
- Global toast notification component (success, error, warning, info variants)
- Hook-based API (useToast) available anywhere
- Replace all ad-hoc toasts (bookmark, repost) with unified system
- Add error toasts for: failed likes, comments, follows, saves, image uploads
- Network error detection and messaging
- Toast styling matching the editorial luxury aesthetic (amber accents, glass morphism)

### 2. Feed & Page Polish
- Skeleton loader cards for feed (reuse shimmer pattern from RelatedPosts)
- Page transitions using Framer Motion (AnimatePresence on route changes)
- Empty state illustrations/messaging for: empty feed, no search results, no followers
- Reading progress indicator on ContentView
- Smooth scroll behaviors

### 3. Micro-interactions & Animations
- Like button: heart fill animation (scale bounce + color transition)
- Bookmark: checkmark bounce animation
- Follow button: satisfying state transition
- Feed cards: staggered entrance animation on load
- Button press feedback (scale 0.97 on active)
- Comment post: slide-in animation for new comment

### 4. Accessibility & Design Tokens
- Formal spacing scale (4px/8px grid system as CSS variables)
- Type scale tokens (h1-h6, body, caption, ui sizes)
- Visible focus rings using :focus-visible (amber outline matching accent)
- Expand aria-label coverage to all interactive elements
- prefers-reduced-motion: reduce support (disable animations)
- Skip-to-content link
- Keyboard navigation for modals (focus trap)

## Constraints
- Must be backward compatible (no breaking changes)
- Should build on existing patterns (CSS variables, Framer Motion, React Query)
- Phase the work so each phase delivers standalone value
- Keep solutions simple — no over-engineering
- Reuse existing skeleton/shimmer patterns where possible
- Toast system should be a single shared component, not per-feature

Design the implementation plan with specific files to create/modify, component APIs, and a suggested build order. Prioritize by impact-to-effort ratio.

content.text: I'll explore the codebase to understand the current patterns and architecture before designing the implementation plan.
